rationale: The citing paper’s core claimed contribution is a new “spillover mechanism” (digital presence spilling over to employee service quality), while the cited paper is explicitly about the “spillover effect of marketing communications” and its moderators (commitment, valence, attribute association). Given this direct construct overlap and the cited work’s likely role as prior spillover theory/mechanism background, this pair is not an obvious incidental mention despite having only DOI-level match evidence.
